title: Add Tasks
description: Add LinkedIn post URLs to scrape commenters and likers using the lobstr.io API

content.introduction: Add LinkedIn post URLs as tasks to your squid. The scraper will extract all users who commented on or reacted to the post, along with their profile information.

urlFormat.title: URL Format
urlFormat.content:
Use any LinkedIn post URL format:

`https://www.linkedin.com/posts/username_post-title-activity-123456789/`

`https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:123456789/`

You can copy the URL directly from any LinkedIn post.

rows.description: URL of the LinkedIn Post to scrape

proTips.content: Scrape viral posts in your industry to build targeted lead lists from engaged audiences.
The scraper extracts both commenters and likers by default. Use settings to toggle each separately.
Posts from LinkedIn influencers often have high-quality engaged audiences for B2B outreach.

seo.title: Add Tasks - LinkedIn Posts Commenters and Likers Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add LinkedIn post URLs to extract commenters and likers using the lobstr.io API.

subcategory: LinkedIn Posts Commenters and Likers Scraper
